text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
We've finally arrived! This hot spring looks
heavenly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm on a trip with Kawakami Princess to
use the hot spring vacation coupon we won at the
shopping district some time back.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
We get to use the hot springs as much as we want!
And feast on all the high-class cuisine we can eat!
choice_data_list: Seems like a great place for a day of relaxation.
Seems like a great place for a day of relaxation.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I'm going to unwind in the hot springs
until my body just melts away. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and after I'm done, I'd like to meet up with
you in your room, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can't mean to have dinner. We've booked a
special reception area for that...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, you're so dense.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This isn't the kind of thing you're supposed to say
out loud, but, well...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to bring all the pillows from my room so we
can have ourselves a pillow-fight death match! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Let's make it a good battle. ☆ I'm itching to fight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, that felt sooo good...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There's so much we can do... before it's time to
eat... like the pillow fight...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
N-no. I... can't sleep until I make the most of my
time here with you, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list:
Getting good sleep is also part of enjoying the
facilities.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: O...kay... I understand...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Trainer, where'd you go?

text_block_list.name: Fairy
text_block_list.text: You've finally awakened, Princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Eeeeek! I-it's a talking squirrel!

text_block_list.name: Fairy
text_block_list.text:
P-please calm down, Princess! I've found the
flower of fighting spirit that lies deep in your
heart—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wait a minute... Could you be that character from
Princess Fighter?

text_block_list.name: Fairy
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I'm an emissary from the turf of light! A fairy
here to help you become Princess Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Fairy
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Good, it doesn't look like there's
anyone else around.

text_block_list.name: Fairy
text_block_list.text: Hey, Princess! Please put on these glass slippers!

text_block_list.name: Fairy
text_block_list.text:
You're an Umamusume fit to become the next
generation Princess Fighter! Your destiny begins
here!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: My... destiny?

text_block_list.name: Fairy
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Your partner of destiny—your prince—is
waiting for you!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...My prince.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Mr. Fairy, but I can't put on these glass
slippers.

text_block_list.name: Fairy
text_block_list.text:
What? Why?! Isn't this what you've always
desired?! It's your destiny to...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No, I choose my own destiny. It's something I
create as I walk down my own path.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: And besides, my prince is—

text_block_list.name: Fairy
text_block_list.text:
Wha—?! Everything's shaking! The world of
dreams is...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...I had a feeling this was a dream. I have to hurry
and wake up.

text_block_list.name: Fairy
text_block_list.text:
Please wait! I'm certain I heard the resonance of
your wish!

text_block_list.name: Fairy
text_block_list.text:
This dream is the final conduit that connects us! If
you sever it, you'll never be able to become
Princess Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Fairy
text_block_list.text:
The prince that will guide you—no, Legendary
Trainer is...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry. The shoes I should be wearing—and the
hand that guides me—have already been decided.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
After all, I'm aiming to become my own ideal
princess, not anyone else's.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz... Bye-bye, Mr. Fairy...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer. Good morning...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Is it time for dinner already?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I see...
choice_data_list: You could have slept for a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...It's fine. I wanted to wake up.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
These three years have gone by so quickly. The
two of us have overcome so much together.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The path we took certainly wasn't easy. It was
bumpy, and there were some frustrations along
the way.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But you never let go of my hand, always guiding
me forward. And we...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: We chose each other.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Will you keep holding my hand as
we run forward together?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm glad to hear that!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now then, let's get this pillow fight started! My
energy reserves are fully charged up!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean, "Huh?" The whole reason I
rested up was so I could make the most of this
time together.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Prepare yourself, Trainer! I won't hold back. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (That's right... I chose you.)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(Even if some other prince suddenly appears
claiming to be Legendary Trainer...)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(Even if some other prince suddenly appears
claiming to be Legendary Trainer...)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (The only prince I need is you.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Kawakami Princess and I have formed
an irreplaceable bond during this time together.
